Last updated: April 2026. How we protect: Last updated: April 2026. How we protect your digital gastronomic identity.
We collect information that you provide: We collect information that you provide directly to us, such as when you create a reservation, order food, or contact us for support. This includes your name, email, phone number, and preferences.
Ocean's Resto implements state-of-the-ar: Ocean's Resto implements state-of-the-art encryption protocols to safeguard your personal data. We treat your privacy with the same precision we apply to our culinary creations.
Your data is used exclusively to enhance: Your data is used exclusively to enhance your experience, manage bookings, process payments, and provide concierge assistance via our AI and staff support.
If you have questions about our digital: If you have questions about our digital protocols, our concierge team is available 24/7.
The agreement between the guest and Ocea: The agreement between the guest and Ocean's Resto. Our mutual commitment to excellence.
By booking a table, you agree to arrive: By booking a table, you agree to arrive within 15 minutes of your scheduled time. Late arrivals may result in the reallocation of your table to ensure optimal flow of our gastronomic experience.
Cancellations must be made at least 24 h: Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours in advance. Deposits for premium experiences or private bookings are non-refundable but may be credited for future visits.
We maintain an environment of refined el: We maintain an environment of refined elegance. We reserve the right to refuse service to anyone whose behavior disrupts the sanctuary of flavor we have created for our guests.
For detailed inquiries regarding our ser: For detailed inquiries regarding our service protocols, please reach out to our legal liaison.
